DefaultBodyText.SourceString: Thanks for purchasing the Rap Boy Reloaded Outfit and Air Jordan 3 SE 'Unite' Kicks! Since this Outfit is already wearing these Kicks, we're refunding your Air Jordan 3 SE 'Unite' Kicks purchase.
